message:
feat: enhanced minimap with branch offshoots and click-to-switch

Add computeBranchLayout to minimap.ts that calculates Y positions and
proportional bar heights for non-active branch paths. Widen minimap from
48px to 64px with a 24px main spine on the left and branch offshoots
extending into the remaining space at 40% opacity. Clicking a branch
offshoot switches to that path and scrolls to the fork point.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
